model: 第七代 Robotaxi（北汽极狐 ARCFOX T5 / 广汽 AION V 第二代）
model_en: Pony.ai Gen-7 Robotaxi (ARCFOX T5 / GAC AION V)
function_name: L4 全无人 Robotaxi — 北京 / 上海 / 广州 / 深圳 四城商业化
function_name_en: L4 Fully-Driverless Robotaxi — BJ/SH/GZ/SZ Commercial Operations
software_version: 基于 NVIDIA DRIVE Orin 的第七代 ADS 系统，系统设计寿命 10 年 / 60 万公里
hardware_config: 4× NVIDIA Orin-X（总算力 1016 TOPS）+ 9× 激光雷达（含 4× 禾赛 AT128 主雷达）+ 14× 摄像头 + 4× 毫米波雷达（650 m 探测）+ 4× 麦克风 + 2× 涉水传感器

boundary_combinations.title_zh: 城市许可 + geofence + 全无人商业化服务
boundary_combinations.title_en: City permit + geofence + fully driverless commercial service
boundary_combinations.condition_zh: 小马智行全无人商业化服务的 ODC 不能脱离城市许可、电子围栏和运营规则理解。
boundary_combinations.condition_en: Pony.ai fully driverless commercial service ODC cannot be read apart from city permits, geofence, and operating rules.
boundary_combinations.public_response_zh: 官方 IR 和前海政府页面披露城市服务和全无人商业化运营，但具体边界应以当地许可和 App 实时规则为准。
boundary_combinations.public_response_en: Official IR and Qianhai government materials disclose city services and fully driverless commercial operations, but exact boundaries depend on local permits and app rules.
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_zh: 全无人服务不是“所有城市道路通用”，而是许可城市、区域和运营条件内的服务。
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_en: Fully driverless service is not universal on all city roads; it is a permitted-area and operating-condition service.
boundary_combinations.developer_note_zh: L4 ODC 的首要组合边界应是城市许可 + geofence + 运营规则。
boundary_combinations.developer_note_en: For L4 ODC, the primary boundary combination should be city permit + geofence + operating rules.

evidence_refs.title: Pony.ai Gen-7 fully-driverless commercial services official PDF
evidence_refs.section: Gen-7 Robotaxi and fully driverless commercial service

evidence_refs.title: 深圳前海管理局 · 小马智行前海全无人商业化运营
evidence_refs.section: 前海全无人商业化运营范围

boundary_combinations.title_zh: 恶劣天气传感器配置 + 停运阈值未公开
boundary_combinations.title_en: Adverse-weather sensor configuration + unpublished suspension threshold
boundary_combinations.condition_zh: 传感器配置显示有恶劣天气设计考虑，但公开资料未披露雨量、能见度、积水或停运阈值。
boundary_combinations.condition_en: Sensor configuration suggests adverse-weather design consideration, but rainfall, visibility, standing-water, and suspension thresholds are not publicly disclosed.
boundary_combinations.public_response_zh: 公开资料没有给出统一运营阈值，不能从传感器数量反推出 ODC 量化边界。
boundary_combinations.public_response_en: Public sources do not provide unified operating thresholds; sensor count should not be reverse-engineered into quantitative ODC boundaries.
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_zh: 有恶劣天气传感器，不等于恶劣天气 ODC 已经公开。
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_en: Adverse-weather sensors do not mean adverse-weather ODC thresholds are public.
boundary_combinations.developer_note_zh: 这是 L4 样例中“硬件能力披露”和“ODC 阈值披露”之间的典型差距。
boundary_combinations.developer_note_en: A typical gap between hardware-capability disclosure and ODC-threshold disclosure in L4 samples.

evidence_refs.title: Pony.ai Gen-7 fully-driverless commercial services official PDF
evidence_refs.section: Gen-7 Robotaxi and fully driverless commercial service

boundary_combinations.title_zh: 车内无安全员 + 远程协助阈值未披露
boundary_combinations.title_en: No in-vehicle safety driver + undisclosed remote-assistance threshold
boundary_combinations.condition_zh: 全无人服务取消车内安全员后，远程协助触发阈值和最小风险策略成为关键组合边界。
boundary_combinations.condition_en: Once the in-vehicle safety driver is removed, remote-assistance trigger thresholds and minimal-risk strategy become key boundary combinations.
boundary_combinations.public_response_zh: 公开资料披露全无人商业化服务，但未披露远程协助和 MRM 的具体触发阈值。
boundary_combinations.public_response_en: Public sources disclose fully driverless commercial service, but not concrete remote-assistance or MRM trigger thresholds.
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_zh: 车内无安全员是能力进展，但远程协助何时介入仍是公开资料缺口。
boundary_combinations.consumer_summary_en: No in-vehicle safety driver is a capability milestone, but when remote assistance intervenes remains a public-source gap.
boundary_combinations.developer_note_zh: 建议作为 L4 厂家确认版本必须补充的组合边界。
boundary_combinations.developer_note_en: Recommended as a required combination boundary for future vendor-confirmed L4 records.

evidence_refs.title: Pony.ai Gen-7 fully-driverless commercial services official PDF
evidence_refs.section: Gen-7 Robotaxi and fully driverless commercial service

metadata.notes: OpenODC 社区已按 2026-05-03 可访问的小马智行官网、IR 官方 PDF、深圳前海政府页面和硬件合作方资料复核。本条可高置信支撑 Gen-7 全无人商业化运营城市、L4 Robotaxi 服务属性、车内无安全员、硬件/算力方向；具体 geofence、速度上限、天气停运阈值、乘客规则和远程协助 SOP 未公开。
